Name: KeyAssignMenuItemParam
Description: Determines the parameters relating the display of key assignments. Obsolete?

Fields.Name: Text ID
Fields.Description: If defined, this points to the one-line help text ID. If not, then the category name ID is used instead. If not specified, it is not displayed in the key configuration menu.

Fields.Name: Key
Fields.Description: The user input key to be assigned. If not specified, it will be treated as a category display item.

Fields.Name: Allow Unassignment
Fields.Description: If ON, then this key can be unassigned.

Fields.Name: Allow Pad Configuration
Fields.Description: If ON, then this key can be assigned to controller inputs.

Fields.Name: Allow Mouse Configuration
Fields.Description: If ON, then this key can be assigned to mouse inputs.

Fields.Name: Key Group
Fields.Description: The group used for determining duplicate assignments. Keys cannot be duplicated in the same group

Fields.Name: Mapping Text ID
Fields.Description: The item name to display in the operation list. 0 means it is not displayed.
